seo/description: Listen to the official soundtracks of Stellar Blade, add your favorite tracks to your playlist, on desktop or mobile app.
navbar/search/placeholder: What do you want to listen to?
modals/create-playlist/description: This playlist is private and only you can access it.
modals/add-to-playlist/description: You want to add {t} to a playlist?
modals/add-to-playlist/no-playlists-desc: You must create a playlist to add tracks
central-bar/characters-playlists-descrip: You can find all official songs for each character.
central-bar/most-liked-songs/description: These are the top 10 most liked songs.
central-bar/most-played-songs-of-the-mon: Most played songs of the month
These are the top 10 of most played songs of the month.
modal-request-login/title: You need to be logged in to do this action
modal-request-login/description: You can login with your Google account. We do not store your informations, only your email to be able to authentify you.
modal-change-profile-picture/description: You can change your profile picture to your favorite character.
modal-change-playlist-picture/descriptio: You can change your playlist picture to your favorite character.
modal-change-playlist-name/description: You can change your playlist name. It cannot be empty.
download-app-ios-modal/title: How to install the app on iOS
download-app-ios-modal/description: Follow these steps to install the app on your iOS device. It's only 3 clicks.
modals/news/description: I'm adding more and more songs. Later, I would like to build a karaoke section where you will be able to sing with friends and visual guides. Hope you'll like
navbar-other-tools/tinycardo/description: Create and study flashcards with spaced repetition.
buy-me-coffee-button/description: If you like **Stellar Blade Music App** and want to thank me, you can share **Tinycardo** with friends on social media. It's a flashcards app that I'm building.
ladder/characters/title: Most popular characters in Stellar Blade
ladder/characters/description/intro: This ranking is built from players choosing their {top5_label}. Each first-place vote is worth 5 points (then 4, 3, 2, 1), so you can see not only who appears most often, but {how_strongly_label} based on community preferences.
ladder/characters/description/how-strong: how strongly each character is liked
ladder/characters/description/top1: Right now, the community's absolute favorite is {top1_name}, who appears in the top 5 {top1_total_votes} times, with {top1_first_votes} players putting them in {first_place_label}.
ladder/characters/description/top2-5: Just behind, {top2_name}, {top3_name}, {top4_name} and {top5_name} regularly appear in players' shortlists, showing up a combined {total_top5_votes} times in top 5 lists. Together, these five characters give a clear picture of which characters Stellar Blade players like the most and who tends to dominate the first-place slot.
ladder/selection/description: Select up to five characters. The {first} you select is your {favorite}, then #2, #3, #4 and #5. Clicking a selected character will {unselect} it.
ladder/characters/seo-description: See the global ranking of your favorite Stellar Blade characters. Vote for your top 5 and discover community favorites.
